title: Domo Mace
description: Resource Pack that changes your mace to be a Cooler by the Brand Domo!
body:
Simple Resource Pack that was made for the german streamer [Papaplatte](https://www.twitch.tv/papaplatte).
It makes your mace look like a DOMO cooler. Has some basic animation.

![Domo Mace when dropped.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80eed1043c91722d37641ac801aae720dabc96fc_0.webp)
